M1000_DC_PSYCH_14_DA M1000 Discharged Past 14 Days From Psychiatric Hospital or Unit This field indicates the patient was discharged from psychiatric hospital or unit during the past 14 days 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x x x
M1000_DC_SNF_14_DA M1000 (M0175) Discharged Past 14 Days From SNF/TCU This field indicates the patient was discharged from skilled nursing facility (SNF / TCU)
